name: unselect_objects
short_description: Unselect items that are currently selected
full_help:
unselect_objects

Description: 
Unselect items that are currently selected

Syntax: 
unselect_objects  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<objects>]

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<objects>]  Objects to unselect

Categories: 
GUIControl

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
